title: LGE Asset Role Policies
summary: 7 asset role policies covering stage hero, quickmenu icon family, banner, commerce, benefit, and PDP summary usage.
markdown:
# LGE Asset Role Policies

## Stage Hero Asset Policy

- policyId: stage-hero
- targetSlots: hero, service-intro, visual
- imageUsageMode: full-bleed-background
- allowedBackgroundRoles: background-only
- allowedPrimaryRoles: n/a
- allowedAccentRoles: object-only, icon-only
- disallowPromoReoverlay: true

- note: Full-bleed stage images must use background-only assets.
- note: Object-only assets may appear as badges, logos, or secondary product accents only.

## Quickmenu Icon Family Policy

- policyId: quickmenu-icon-family
- targetSlots: quickmenu, quickMenu, tabs, shortcut
- imageUsageMode: icon-family
- allowedBackgroundRoles: n/a
- allowedPrimaryRoles: icon-only
- allowedAccentRoles: n/a
- disallowPromoReoverlay: true

- note: Quickmenu and tab-entry surfaces must use one consistent icon family.
- note: Promo-complete thumbnails must not be reused as icon shells.

## Banner Asset Policy

- policyId: banner-stage
- targetSlots: summary-banner-2, tipsBanner, brandBanner, careBanner, labelBanner, banner, noticeBanner
- imageUsageMode: full-bleed-background
- allowedBackgroundRoles: background-only
- allowedPrimaryRoles: n/a
- allowedAccentRoles: object-only
- disallowPromoReoverlay: true

- note: Banner backgrounds should be text-free or image-only surfaces.
- note: Promo-complete banner art must not receive a second text overlay.

## Commerce Grid Asset Policy

- policyId: commerce-grid
- targetSlots: md-choice, timedeal, subscription, space-renewal, latest-product-news, brand-showroom, marketing-area, bestProduct, best-ranking, ranking
- imageUsageMode: card-media
- allowedBackgroundRoles: n/a
- allowedPrimaryRoles: n/a
- allowedAccentRoles: n/a
- disallowPromoReoverlay: false

- note: Commerce sections may use product/object imagery directly.
- note: Use promo-complete assets only when they are the complete card content, not a re-overlaid background.

## Benefit Hub Asset Policy

- policyId: benefit-hub
- targetSlots: benefit, benefit-highlight, mainService, bestcare, service-benefit
- imageUsageMode: icon-or-object
- allowedBackgroundRoles: n/a
- allowedPrimaryRoles: icon-only, object-only
- allowedAccentRoles: n/a
- disallowPromoReoverlay: true

- note: Benefit hubs should use icons or simple object visuals, not full promo banners.

## PDP Summary Stage Asset Policy

- policyId: pdp-summary-stage
- targetSlots: summary
- imageUsageMode: full-bleed-background
- allowedBackgroundRoles: background-only
- allowedPrimaryRoles: n/a
- allowedAccentRoles: object-only
- disallowPromoReoverlay: true

- note: PDP summary hero surfaces should use product/background imagery without embedded promo text.

## PDP Sticky Buybox Asset Policy

- policyId: pdp-sticky-buybox
- targetSlots: sticky
- imageUsageMode: no-required-image
- allowedBackgroundRoles: n/a
- allowedPrimaryRoles: n/a
- allowedAccentRoles: n/a
- disallowPromoReoverlay: false

- note: Sticky buybox should avoid decorative media unless explicitly requested.
